library.title: The Epistolary Library
library.subtitle: Treatises in the manner of Euler, for builders who love the universe

books.title: Letters on the Universal Machine
books.subtitle: A Treatise on WebAssembly, from Transistors to Transcendence
books.manner: In the manner of Euler's Letters to a German Princess
books.description: From the humblest transistor to infinite fractals running in a browser sandbox. What a computer actually is, why WebAssembly had to exist, and how the chain from silicon to screen remains faithful at every layer.

books.title: Letters on the Ownership of Memory
books.subtitle: A Treatise on Rust, from Pointers to Proof
books.manner: In the manner of Euler's Letters to a German Princess
books.description: Why every value must have an owner, why references must not outlive their referents, and how a compiler can prove the absence of an entire class of bugs that has plagued computing for fifty years.

books.title: Letters on the Sovereignty of Value
books.subtitle: A Treatise on Bitcoin, from Barter to the Lightning Network
books.manner: In the manner of Euler's Letters to a German Princess
books.description: From barter and clay tablets to elliptic curves and payment channels. What money actually is, why Bitcoin had to exist, and how a network of sovereign verification replaced the need to trust any single institution.

books.title: Letters on the Sovereign Application
books.subtitle: A Treatise on Progressive Web Apps, from Cache to Coronation
books.manner: In the manner of Euler's Letters to a German Princess
books.description: From the humblest HTTP request to the service worker's interception, from the manifest's declaration to the cache's sovereignty. What a web app actually is, why Progressive Web Apps had to exist, and how a URL becomes an icon on your home screen.

books.title: Letters on the Composition of Systems
books.subtitle: A Treatise on the Euler Framework, from Axioms to Archmage
books.manner: In the manner of Euler's Letters to a German Princess
books.description: The system explaining its own engine. Five general-purpose WASM modules — JSON, Store, Theme, Router, Search — composed into a framework that powers this very library. The reader who finishes understands not just the framework, but why it must be this way.

books.title: Letters on the Making of the Library
books.subtitle: A Treatise on Software Engineering, through the Lens of the Epistolary Library Itself
books.manner: In the manner of Euler's Letters to a German Princess
books.description: The system explaining itself. Every concept in software engineering — from files to deployment — taught through the actual code of this very library. The reader who finishes can fork the repo and build their own.

books.title: Letters on the Web of Messages
books.subtitle: A Treatise on WhatsApp, WebAssembly, and the Sovereign Network, from Drums to Digital Markets
books.manner: In the manner of Euler's Letters to a German Princess
books.description: From the talking drum to the Signal Protocol, from the Onitsha marketplace to Nostr relays. How WhatsApp became Africa's digital economy, why it can serve as an event bus for peer-to-peer commerce, and how WebAssembly, Lightning, and cryptographic identity can make that economy sovereign.

books.title: Letters on the Mathematics of Reality
books.subtitle: A Treatise on the Language of the Universe, from Counting to Calculus
books.manner: In the manner of Euler's Letters to a German Princess
books.description: Euler's own domain. From the shepherd's tally to the calculus of change, from compound interest to the bell curve. Mathematics as the African builder's birthright — the language that does not lie.

books.title: Letters on the Sovereign Enterprise
books.subtitle: A Treatise on Building, from First Customer to Enduring Institution
books.manner: In the manner of Euler's Letters to a German Princess
books.description: From the village market to Flutterwave. Enterprise is Africa's oldest technology. The principles of value, revenue, growth, and endurance — taught from first principles through M-Pesa, Paystack, Andela, and the ancient traders of Timbuktu.

books.title: Letters on the Generative Canvas
books.subtitle: A Treatise on Creative Coding, from Pixel to Pattern, through the Lens of African Design
books.manner: In the manner of Euler's Letters to a German Princess
books.description: Kente patterns are algorithms. Adinkra symbols are visual programs. African design has always been computational. This treatise teaches creative coding through the lens of ancestral craft — the reader creates art that runs in the browser.

books.title: Letters on the Architecture of Wealth
books.subtitle: A Treatise on Money, Markets, and the Mathematics of Prosperity
books.manner: In the manner of Euler's Letters to a German Princess
books.description: Financial literacy is sovereignty. From M-Pesa to stock markets, from compound interest to chamas and stokvels, from budgeting to generational wealth. The African builder who understands money cannot be deceived.

books.title: Letters on the Patterns of Nature
books.subtitle: A Treatise on Systems Thinking, from Feedback Loops to Emergent Order
books.manner: In the manner of Euler's Letters to a German Princess
books.description: The deep patterns that connect ecology, economics, technology, and governance. Why some cities thrive. Why some businesses scale. Why some interventions backfire. Euler saw the same laws everywhere — this book makes that vision explicit.
